reason: Check global boundary, source-of-truth, and RVV Stage1/Stage2 invariants.
Check RVV typed body and plugin-owned legality/realization/provider ownership.
Check common EmitC/export remain neutral and route payload is provider-built.
Check tcrv.exec does not gain RVV compute, dtype, route, or intrinsic authority.
Check selected-body realization consumes code-affecting facts before route construction.
Check focused compiler tests and real ssh rvv evidence support any correctness claim.
Check no core/common RVV semantic branch is introduced.
Check new constructs stay in RVV extension-family execution body, not core compute IR.
